title: Zenith Renewed
description: Fabric port of Apotheosis. Overhauls enchanting, spawners, bosses, and adds powerful weapon affixes!
body:
# Zenith Renewed **Zenith Renewed** is an active, maintained continuation of [Zenith](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenith), the Fabric port of [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis). Zenith adds incredible depth to vanilla Minecraft systems. It is split into **6 independent modules**, each focusing on a different aspect of the game. You can disable any module you don't like, though they are designed to work perfectly together. 📖 **In-Game Documentation:** Highly recommend crafting the **Chronicle of Shadows** (1 Book + 1 Gold Ingot) for an in-game guide to everything Zenith has to offer. --- ### 📦 Dependencies * **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** * **[FakerLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fakerlib)** * **[Zenith Attributes Renewed](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenith-attributes-renewed)** **Recommended:** * **[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)** --- ### 🧩 The Modules
🗡️ Adventure Module
The Adventure Module completely changes the exploration and combat loop. It introduces new bosses, a new loot system and powerful gems you can socket into your weapons. ![Mythic rarity netherite sword with affixes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTDFctVr/images/17dcd058bccbc97e476d414bcaaa44f608580df6.png)
✨ Enchantment Module
The Enchantment module completely overhauls the vanilla enchanting system. It replaces the old level 30 cap with a massive new system driven by three new stats: Eterna, Quanta, and Arcana. It adds many enchantments, as well as a configurable max level for them. ![New enchanting table screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTDFctVr/images/3f553e10a8f580b31baa2ea8d7e1337428393a9d.png)
🧪 Potion Module
The Potion module fills in the gaps of vanilla brewing. It adds craftable potions for effects that were previously unavailable (like Resistance and Luck) and introduces brand-new effects. It also adds craftable Potion Charms, which can be infused to provide permanent potion effects. ![Infusing a Potion Charm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTDFctVr/images/0a0429a3d749c5d8549fb0b31daef164320e5813.png)
🌵 Garden Module
The Garden module allows you to configure custom growth heights for Cactus, Sugarcane, and Bamboo, making your automated farms significantly more productive. ![Custom height for Bamboo, Cactus and Sugar Cane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTDFctVr/images/25ac56f726a25019a4c3f847f475979d114903d5.png)
🔥 Spawner Module
The Spawner module allows you to pick up Monster Spawners using Silk Touch. But that's not all: you can use specific items to modify the spawner's stats. Want it to spawn mobs faster? Ignore lighting conditions? Ignore the maximum entity cap? You can upgrade it to your exact needs. ![Example of a max range spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTDFctVr/images/adb837d1327f2dd9d5c584532475bd6df1240a90.png)
🏘️ Village Module
The Village module gives the Fletching Table a real purpose: crafting specialized, powerful new arrows (like Explosive Arrows, Mining Arrows, and more). It also revamps the Wandering Trader, giving them a much-needed buff with highly valuable and rare trades. ![The new UI for the Fletching Table, as well of a new arrow type](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GTDFctVr/images/49acb7b65a6c51cca1f9288386aa9f67d1007ef8.png) ![Wandering Trader UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TLZe11Uj/images/1d58cc7f8b4317499bfbcc19f2355e4ab87f6a17.png)
--- ### 🤝 Credits * **TheWinABagel:** Previous maintainer who developed the Fabric port. * **Safro:** Original developer of the Zenith Fabric port. * **Shadows_of_Fire:** Creator and developer of the original Forge mod, Apotheosis. * **Faellynna:** Original art and textures. *(Please do not report issues with Zenith Renewed to the original developers. Use the Issues tracker on this project's GitHub!)*
